description: Lincoln and Daisy discuss Joey's departure and what choices they both have for their future. Daisy reassures Lincoln that he can return to a normal life if he wishes, but Lincoln expresses his interest in staying. Their conversation highlights the blurred lines between personal choice and destiny among the Inhumans.

transcript.line: Welcome back. So, I just ran into Joey, packing up.
Yeah. You think I'm making a mistake?
Letting him live a normal life like everyone else? No, you're not.
No, I mean offering you the same deal. Your APB's been lifted. No one's looking for you. You could go back to your old life if you want.
I don't know. It's pretty interesting here.
I was hoping you'd say that.
